case_title: PAUL D. KING VS. CAROLINE CAPITANO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, PAUL D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPITANO, CAROLINE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.00, AFTER JUDGMENT IS FINAL, DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY SHALL RELEASE FUNDS HELD IN ESCROW, NO. 0221003362 TO PLANTIFF, ON PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND, TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. CONTINUANCE WILL NOT BE EFFECTIVE UNTIL FILING FEE IS RECEIVED BY THE COURT. IF FEE NOT PAID BY APRIL 2,2010, CASE WILL GO OFF-CALENDAR. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO CAROLINE CAPITANO.
CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT CAROLINE CAPITANO, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CAROLINE CAPITANO NOT PRESENT. CO-DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
